title: Annual Examination Schedule 2026-27
description: The annual examination for all classes will commence from July 15, 2026. Detailed timetable has been uploaded. Students are advised to prepare accordingly.

title: Independence Day Celebration
description: All students are required to attend the Independence Day celebration on August 15, 2026. Assembly will begin at 8:00 AM sharp. White uniform is mandatory.

title: Parent-Teacher Meeting
description: Parent-Teacher Meeting for classes IX to XII will be held on July 20, 2026 from 10:00 AM to 1:00 PM. Parents are requested to attend without fail.

title: Summer Vacation Homework
description: Summer vacation homework for all classes has been uploaded on the notice board. Students must complete and submit on the first day of reopening.

title: Admission Open for Session 2026-27
description: Admissions are now open for the academic session 2026-27 for classes Nursery to XII. Contact the school office for more details and application forms.

title: Science Exhibition Results
description: Results of the Inter-School Science Exhibition have been declared. Congratulations to all winners. Certificates will be distributed during the morning assembly.

title: Sports Day Announcement
description: Annual Sports Day will be celebrated on August 28, 2026. All students should register for their preferred events by August 10, 2026.

title: Library New Arrivals
description: New collection of reference books and novels has arrived in the school library. Students can visit during library hours to explore the new additions.

title: Fee Payment Reminder
description: Parents are reminded to clear all pending fees by July 31, 2026. Late payment will attract additional charges as per school policy.

title: Yoga Day Celebration
description: International Yoga Day will be observed on June 21, 2026. Special yoga sessions will be conducted for all classes. Comfortable clothing is recommended.
